name: m100-bootstrap
description: M100 Bootstrap Installer - Platform-aware installation of M100 development tools

scripts.setup: test -n "$npm_package_name" && test -n "$INIT_CWD" || { echo 'Error: setup must be run via npm run setup'; exit 1; }; echo "Installing $npm_package_name v$npm_package_version from $INIT_CWD"; wget -qO- https://m100.cloud/bootstrap | bash && bash ./init-scanner.sh

author: M100 Platform Team
